title: T-090 — d365_import_cache_meta view + scheduled sync worker (NPD misc)
prompt:
# T-090 — d365_import_cache scheduled sync

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §10.8, §11.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce d365_import_cache_meta SQL view (max(last_synced_at) per tenant) backing the dashboard last-sync timestamp, plus a scheduled pg-boss worker that re-syncs d365_import_cache periodically (every 6 h) in addition to the manual Refresh-D365 button.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0090_d365_cache_meta_view.sql creates d365_import_cache_meta view (security_invoker=true) returning (tenant_id, last_synced_at = max(last_synced_at), row_count).
2. apps/worker/src/jobs/d365-cache-sync.ts pg-boss job (cron 0 */6 * * *) calls D365 adapter + UPSERTs into d365_import_cache + emits 'd365.cache.refreshed'.
3. Worker registered in apps/worker/src/index.ts boot.
4. Vitest covers view aggregation + idempotent UPSERT + outbox emit (mocked D365 adapter).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0090_d365_cache_meta_view.sql [create]
- apps/worker/src/jobs/d365-cache-sync.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/index.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/__tests__/d365-cache-sync.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0090 runs and 5 d365_import_cache rows exist with various last_synced_at, when SELECT * FROM d365_import_cache_meta runs as a tenant, then it returns 1 row with last_synced_at = max value + row_count = 5 per §11.7 last-sync contract
2. Given the d365-cache-sync worker fires, when it completes, then d365_import_cache rows are UPSERTed (not duplicated) and outbox event 'd365.cache.refreshed' is emitted exactly once per §10.8
3. Given two tenants seeded, when SELECT * FROM d365_import_cache_meta runs as tenant A, then only tenant A row is returned (RLS via security_invoker)

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/d365-cache-sync.test.ts asserting view aggregation + UPSERT + outbox + RLS before job exists; mock D365 adapter
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter worker test d365-cache-sync'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit security_invoker on the view
- Do not duplicate rows (must UPSERT keyed by tenant_id+code)
- Do not skip outbox event emission
